name: spinLoop
purpose: Endlose, gleichfoermige Rotation — kontinuierliches Drehen um 360 Grad (compositor-guenstig, z. B. Loader oder dekoratives Element).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-spinLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s linear infinite {{css params.direction}}; }
@keyframes motion-spinLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: rotate(0deg) } to { transform: rotate(360deg) } }
